# Organization Guest Membership (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Organization Guest Membership.

```terraform
data "foundry_organization_guest_membership" "example" {
  organization_rid = "ri.foundry.main.organization.example-organization-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_rid` (String) RID of the Organization. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `organization_guest_members` (Set of String) List of the IDs of the guest members (Users or Groups) of this Organization.
